problem_statement: Percentile summaries computed with this library disagree with numpy and spreadsheet software on the same inputs. For example, the median of the four values 1, 2, 3, 4 comes back as 3 instead of 2.5, and the lower quartile of a five-value series is noticeably too high. The minimum and maximum endpoints are returned correctly, as are single-value series, so only interior percentiles drift. Please correct the calculation so interior percentiles interpolate between order statistics the way the documentation describes.
